sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zogam, Zomi, Zogam ei hong pia Pa Pasian thang hen!
Zogam, Zomi, Zogam ei hong pia Pa

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Beh le phung pawlpi ngeina pau kilamdang zong,
Zogam ading Pasian, Zomi ading Pasian,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Thungen in nasem hanciam Zogam tate w,
Zomite i belh i suan in Pasian bek
Jesuh in Topa ci’n phat un.
Lungsim khutte lamto-in Pasian liansak un.
